step_rationale: ERBB2 signaling protects endothelial cells from EndMT and dysfunction.
mechanism: ERBB2, activated by neuregulin-1, transduces anti-inflammatory and anti-EndMT signals in endothelial cells, preserving barrier function and vascular stability.

references.title: Tongxinluo Attenuates Myocardiac Fibrosis after Acute Myocardial Infarction in Rats via Inhibition of Endothelial-to-Mesenchymal Transition.
